tasks.prompt:
Evolution tracking check: 
1. Check orchestrator status: curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/control/status | python3 -m json.tool
2. Check evolution state: curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/evolution/state | python3 -m json.tool  
3. Check daemon alive: ps aux | grep elo_daemon | grep -v grep
4. Check latest bot: ls -d bots/claude_v*/ | sort -t'v' -k2 -n | tail -3
5. Check pipeline stage: cat web/core/results/pipeline_state.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Stage: {d[\"stage\"]}, v{d[\"next_v\"]}, attempt: {d[\"generation_attempt\"]}, worker_failures: {d[\"worker_failure_count\"]}')"
6. Check ratings top 5: cat web/core/results/glicko_ratings.json | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);items=sorted(d.items(),key=lambda x:x[1].get('r',1500) if isinstance(x[1],dict) else x[1].r, reverse=True);[print(f'{k}: r={v.get(\"r\",1500) if isinstance(v,dict) else v.r:.1f}, rd={v.get(\"rd\",350) if isinstance(v,dict) else v.rd:.1f}') for k,v in items[:5]]"
7. Check for errors: grep -c "error\|Error\|CRITICAL\|Traceback" web/logs/app.log 2>/dev/null || echo "0 errors"
8. Run tests if a new bot was committed: cd web && python -m pytest tests/ --timeout=60 -q 2>&1 | tail -5

Report all findings concisely. If anything is wrong (daemon dead, orchestrator stuck >30min, tests failing), flag it clearly.
